# Purpose
This C header file defines a weak function [`put_bytes_cancel`](<#put_bytes_cancel>). The function is declared with the `WEAK` attribute, which allows it to be overridden by other implementations in different translation units. The function [`put_bytes_cancel`](<#put_bytes_cancel>) is defined as an empty function, indicating that it does not perform any operations by default. The file includes two other headers: `services/common/prf_update.h` and `util/attributes.h`, which may provide additional functionality or attributes used in conjunction with this function. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
